name: 60 BPM
short_description: 60 Beats per Minute is the rhythm of a healthy heart at rest, but be ready to speed it up! Play 43 levels by tapping on-beat with the music following sound and visual cues. Enjoy spectacular surprises, with soothing music and visuals from the calm of a starry night to the rush of heated battles!
detailed_description:
60 Beats per Minute is the rhythm of a healthy heart at rest, but be ready to speed it up, chill out, and enjoy the music with 60 BPM!

As a rhythm game, you play by tapping on-beat with the music by following sound and visual cues, with cute companions and powerful boosters eagerly to assist along your journey.

Features:
- 40 levels across 4 unique visuals and gameplay
- 3 very-special levels (you won't be disappointed!)
- 2 difficulty modes and support items to guide your rhythm
- Available in 12 languages
- Screen ratio and background music customization
- Sound delay calibration

Challenge your rhythm, enjoy original catchy songs and spectacular surprises on every level, with soothing visuals from the calm of a starry night to the rush of heated battles. Prepare to immerse yourself in the captivating realm of 60 BPM!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Turkish, Vietnamese
